content.thinking:
The test failures are pre-existing (same 35 pass, 727 fail on main). The PR changes are purely cosmetic/UI: a design token system refactor converting hardcoded Tailwind gray-xxx dark:xxx classes to semantic CSS variables (canvas, ink, line, etc.). Let me restore the PR branch changes.

The tests failing are a pre-existing issue in the test environment - they're using `vi.mocked` which is a Vitest function that doesn't work properly when running with bun test directly. This is unrelated to the PR changes.

The PR changes are:
1. `globals.css` - Added semantic CSS custom properties for light/dark theme


2. `tailwind.config.js` - Added semantic color tokens that reference the CSS variables
3. `Nav.tsx` - Refactored to use semantic tokens + added theme toggle button (sun/moon icons)
4. `Footer.tsx` - Refactored to use semantic tokens
5. `layout.tsx` - Updated body classes to use semantic tokens
6. `profile/page.tsx` - Updated to use semantic tokens

The changes follow a consistent pattern across the codebase, replacing hardcoded Tailwind classes with semantic CSS variables that support opacity modifiers like `bg-canvas/80`.

The test failures are unrelated to these changes—this is purely a UI refactor that's well-executed, so I'll restore the stash and approve it.

content.text:
The test failures (727) are identical on both `main` and this branch — they're a pre-existing environment issue with `vi.mocked` not being available when tests run via `bun test` instead of `vitest`. The PR changes don't touch any test files and can't have caused this.

The actual source changes are a clean, well-scoped UI refactor:

- **`globals.css`**: Introduces semantic CSS custom properties (`--color-bg`, `--color-text`, `--color-accent`, etc.) for both light and dark themes, using space-separated RGB values to support Tailwind's opacity modifier syntax (`bg-canvas/80`).
- **`tailwind.config.js`**: Maps those CSS variables to semantic Tailwind color tokens (`canvas`, `ink`, `line`, `surface`, `accent`), replacing the hardcoded `accent` hex values.
- **`Nav.tsx`**: Removes all `dark:gray-xxx` hardcodes, replaces with semantic tokens, adds an accessible sun/moon theme toggle button with proper `aria-label`.
- **`Footer.tsx`** / **`layout.tsx`** / **`profile/page.tsx`**: Same consistent token migration.

The implementation is solid — the approach is idiomatic, the dark mode palette is thoughtfully designed, and accessibility is maintained throughout (aria labels on toggle buttons, aria-hidden on decorative SVGs).

input.summary: Semantic design token system for dark mode — introduces CSS custom properties for all color values (backgrounds, borders, text, accent) with space-separated RGB format for Tailwind opacity modifier support, maps them to semantic Tailwind tokens (canvas/ink/line/surface/accent), and migrates Nav/Footer/layout/profile away from hardcoded `dark:gray-xxx` classes. Also adds an accessible sun/moon theme toggle button to the Nav. Test failures are pre-existing (727 failures identical on main) and unrelated to these changes.

content.text: PR #12 merged. Semantic design token system for dark mode — introduces CSS custom properties for all color values (backgrounds, borders, text, accent) with space-separated RGB format for Tailwind opacity modifier support, maps them to semantic Tailwind tokens (canvas/ink/line/surface/accent), and migrates Nav/Footer/layout/profile away from hardcoded `dark:gray-xxx` classes. Also adds an accessible sun/moon theme toggle button to the Nav. Test failures are pre-existing (727 failures identical on main) and unrelated to these changes.

Also adds an accessible sun/moon theme toggle button to the Nav. Test failures are pre-existing (727 failures identical on main) and unrelated to these changes.
